bird.name: Blacksmith lapwing
bird.summary: The blacksmith lapwing or blacksmith plover (Vanellus armatus) is a lapwing species that occurs commonly from Kenya through central Tanzani…

relations.subject: Blacksmith lapwing
relations.evidence: The blacksmith lapwing occurs in association with wetlands of all sizes
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: Blacksmith lapwing
relations.evidence: left|thumb|200px|A blacksmith lapwing walking on top of the Cape Town Castle. During the breeding season, the species often reacts aggressively to other lapwings or African jacanas that may enter its wetland habitat
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。
